gt_sql: SELECT T1.Admission FROM Patient AS T1 INNER JOIN Laboratory AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID WHERE T2.ALP < 300
pred_sql: SELECT DISTINCT p.Admission FROM Laboratory l JOIN Patient p ON l.ID = p.ID WHERE l.ALP < 300 AND p.Admission IN ('+', '-');
question: For patients with alkaliphophatase (ALP) within normal range, were they treated as inpatient or outpatient?
